_meta.note: Daemon-backed session status (omni P1). Returns the session lifecycle state, best-known current working directory, and a bounded environment snapshot. The cwd is tracked from the start cwd + recognisable `cd` lines; `pwd` via shell_session_exec returns the authoritative directory as a combed signal. TB-7: session_id is opaque (copy verbatim, e.g. ses_<32hex>).

unsupported_platform_error_example.message: daemon ipc error [UnsupportedPlatform]: persistent shell sessions are not available on this platform yet (PTY/ConPTY pending)

unknown_session_error_example.message: daemon ipc error [UnknownSession]: unknown session id: ses_018f0000000000000000000000000099

invariants: success payload reports state, cwd, a bounded env_snapshot, and last_active_at only
an unknown session fails with UnknownSession, never a synthetic empty status
env_snapshot is bounded and never includes the inherited host environment (no unredacted secrets)
